0.content:
# 🔍 Active Directory — Lockout & Disable Root Cause Analysis
Investigates the root cause of user account lockouts or disable events by correlating lockouts (4740), disables (4725), failed logons (4625), and Kerberos failures (4771).

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4725")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4625")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4771")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

9.content: # Combined Event Timeline (Lockouts, Disables, Failed Logons)

12.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account That Was Locked Out:' DATA:AccountSID_Name 'Additional Information:'
DATA 'Caller Computer Name:' DATA:CallerComputer """
| fields timestamp, host.name, AccountSID_Name, CallerComputer
| sort timestamp desc

14.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4725")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:		' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:		' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:NewAccount EOL
"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, AccountDisabled = NewAccount
//, NewAccountDomain
//, content
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

16.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4625")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")

| parse content, """LD:'logcontent'EOL
LD EOL
LD EOL
LD SPACE LD ':' LD: 'Subject_SecurityID' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Subject_AccountName' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Subject_AccountDomain' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Subject_Logon_ID' EOL
LD EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Logon_LogonType' EOL
LD EOL
LD:'AccountForWhichFailed'EOL
LD ':' LD: 'NewLogon_SecurityID' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'AffectedAccountName' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'AffectedAccountDOmain' EOL
DATA 'Failure Reason:		' LD:FailureReasonDetail
"""
| fields host.name, AffectedAccountName, AffectedAccountDOmain, FailureReasonDetail, content
| parse content, """DATA 'Source Network Address:	' LD:SourceMachine EOL"""
| fieldsAdd SourceMachine
| fieldsRemove content

18.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account That Was Locked Out:' DATA:AccountSID_Name 'Additional Information:'
DATA 'Caller Computer Name:' DATA:CallerComputer """
| summarize LockoutCount = count(), UniqueDevices = countDistinct(CallerComputer), LastLockout = last(timestamp), by:AccountSID_Name
| sort LockoutCount desc
